nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 5 - Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 Group Photo
nodes.description: Large group photograph of attendees at the Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 held in a grand hotel ballroom. Hundreds of participants stand together in a formal group photo. Top right corner shows the Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 and IFN (ICT Federation Nepal) logos. Powered by Ting Ting and Raindrop.
